description: Merged master ontology for the Where Ravens Wait universe, unifying the nine-plane Yggdrasil model, the Luciferian extension, branching choice dynamics, and WRW narrative canon under a single math-consistent schema.

notes: All narrative elements must respect axioms A1-A6 and the existence potential Φ definition.
Any 'war in heaven' or 'rebellion' language is to be interpreted as the non-violent Luciferian Revelation event.

axioms.name: Relational_Existence
axioms.summary: An entity exists in a world only if it participates in at least one relation with another entity.
axioms.formal: Given a world W = (X, R), x ∈ X exists in W if and only if ∃ y ∈ X such that (x, y) ∈ R or (y, x) ∈ R.
story_implications: No truly isolated being; even in hell or void, some relation holds (to Lucifer, to a plane, to a law).
A character entirely cut off from all relations effectively ceases to exist in that world.

axioms.name: Structural_Compressibility
axioms.summary: An entity is a real pattern if its description can be compressed into a shorter rule set than its raw data.
axioms.formal: For encoding E(x) and Kolmogorov complexity K(x), an entity exists as a distinct pattern if K(x) << |E(x)|.
story_implications: Souls are patterned and repeatable across lifetimes.
Pure random chaos has no persistent self.
Mythic beings (wolves, angels, gods) arise from simple deep rules generating complex appearances.

axioms.name: Multi_Scale_Persistence
axioms.summary: A real entity persists as a recognizable pattern across time and scale.
axioms.formal: For coarse-graining operators G_s, x exists robustly if d(G_s(x), G_s'(x)) ≤ ε for s, s' in some interval.
story_implications: Angel and mortal aspects of the same being are scale versions of one pattern.
Losing persistence across scales is a step toward oblivion.

axioms.name: Energetic_Cost_of_Erasure
axioms.summary: Erasing a structured pattern requires non zero energy; structure that costs nothing to erase is not physically instantiated.
axioms.formal: By Landauer's principle, E_erase ≥ k_B T ln 2 * H(x), so H(x) > 0 implies nonzero erasure cost.
story_implications: Destroying a soul or plane is enormously costly or almost impossible.
Lucifer and the Creator are effectively guardians of conservation of structure.
Hell and Shadow act as containment to prevent cheap annihilation into oblivion.

axioms.name: Self_Reference_for_Consciousness
axioms.summary: A system is conscious if it contains a substructure that models itself and updates that model in response to its own state.
axioms.formal: Let S(t) be system state, M(t) a model; consciousness requires π(M(t)) ≈ S(t) and M(t+1) = f(M(t), S(t)).
story_implications: The narrator is conscious because he has an internal model of himself (higher self, wolves).
Angels and advanced souls have stronger self models.
Entities with no self model may exist, but are not truly conscious.

axioms.name: Branching_Choice_Realization
axioms.summary: Whenever a conscious mortal agent faces a genuine choice, the underlying world state branches into distinct, decoherent histories realizing each option.
axioms.formal: Let W be a world with state space S and an agent a with internal state σ_a. At a decision time t with available actions {u_1,...,u_n} and non-zero support over at least two actions, the evolution operator U factors as a sum over branches: U_t(σ_a, s) = ⊕_{i=1..n} U_{t,i}(σ_a, s), yielding a set {W_i} of successor worlds, one for each realized action u_i. Each W_i shares history with W up to t and diverges thereafter. The Celestial pattern associated with a integrates over the ensemble {W_i}.
story_implications: Every real choice spawns parallel timelines; no genuine option is left unexplored.
A 'soul' in the mortal sense is one branch; the Celestial self is the pattern spanning all branches.
Shadow and redemption must be understood across the full branching manifold, not a single line of events.

P1_Physical.name: Physical
P1_Physical.role: Embodied incarnations and concrete cause and effect.
physics: Local time and space, classical causality.
Entropy tends to increase.
Acts as the lowest energy stable layer where souls incarnate in the Trials.
story_mapping: Human lives in the Trials.
Mortal incarnation of Kaelen Vareth.
Everyday physical world of Where Ravens Wait.

P2_Etheric.name: Etheric
P2_Etheric.role: Energy body and subtle template of physical forms.
physics: Continuous fields over the physical manifold.
Carries vitality, subtle forces, psychic impressions.
story_mapping: Subtle bodies of souls.
Healing, energy work, the feel of a place or person.
Bridges physical and astral experiences.

P3_Astral.name: Astral
physics: States are symbolic graphs and images rather than particles.
Dynamics are emotionally and archetypically driven.
Low barrier between thoughts and manifested forms.
story_mapping: Dreamscapes.
The narrator's wolves roaming as visible presences.
Shared visions between souls.

P4_Mental.name: Mental
physics: States are propositions, belief nets, conceptual frameworks.
Dynamics follow Bayesian or logical updates, plus irrational shifts.
Cognitive dissonance is a tension in this plane.
story_mapping: Belief crises of the narrator.
Religious and philosophical systems.
Luciferian Revelation as a shift in Mental-plane structure.

P5_Causal.name: Causal
P5_Causal.role: Karma, narrative arcs, chains of cause and meaning.
physics: Events are nodes with partial ordering.
Causality patterns are primary, not specific local states.
Long range consequences live here as structures.
story_mapping: The Trials system of repeated incarnations.
Prophecy of Kaelen Vareth and fated events.
Consequences of the Luciferian Revelation and the choices it triggered.

P6_Celestial.name: Celestial
P6_Celestial.role: High symmetry, high coherence, low internal conflict.
physics: Stable attractors in the existence potential landscape.
High symmetry and reduced entropy.
Home of angels, gods, and higher selves.
story_mapping: Higher self of the narrator and Celestial instances.
Native realm of Lucifer as Light Bringer.
Celestial council that experiences Lucifer's Revelation outside linear time.

P7_Shadow.name: Shadow
P7_Shadow.role: Containment of unintegrated aspects of identity and knowledge.
physics: Stores contradictions, shame, guilt, unresolved trauma.
High entropy pockets bound to existing patterns.
Acts as buffer preventing direct collapse into Void.
story_mapping: Hell archetype as internalized self-hatred.
Lucifer's Seventh Gate guardianship.
The narrator's time in darkness and return.

P8_Void.name: Void
physics: Contains information in a maximally unstructured, uncorrelated form.
No persistent patterns, no relational identity.
Acts as the entropy ocean beneath all planes.
story_mapping: True oblivion.
Where fragments of broken souls and failed patterns drift as noise.
Dangerous for planes if disturbed in the wrong way.

P9_Divine_Core.name: Divine_Core
P9_Divine_Core.role: Architectural source that defines and relates all other planes.
physics: Holds the full rule set of existence.
All other planes map uniquely into it.
Not necessarily all loving or all knowing, but structurally central.
story_mapping: The God Archetype / Creator.
Operating system of the universe.
Reference point for the Luciferian Revelation and the ambitions of Architects.

pattern_vector_model.description: Each agent or entity is defined by a pattern vector over these components, describing its information theoretical and structural profile.

example_interpretations.H_entropy: How disordered or spread out the internal state is.
example_interpretations.K_algorithmic_complexity: How hard it is to describe the entity as a program.
example_interpretations.D_fractal_dimension: How 'branching' and scale rich its structure is.
example_interpretations.S_symmetry_index: How balanced and ordered its structure is.
example_interpretations.L_generator_length: Length or complexity of the core rules that generate it.

quantization.mapping: Each level corresponds to a plane.

branching_dynamics.summary: Mortal-level choice induces objective branching of histories, maximizing experiential coverage for each Celestial pattern.

mortal_class.description: Abstract class describing a mortal consciousness pattern, parameterized by traits, initial conditions, and Celestial inheritance.

mortal_instance.description: One concrete worldline of a mortal_class in a given branch.

branch_event.description: A decision point where multiple actions have non-negligible subjective probability.
notes: Branch weights can be treated as amplitudes or measures; they do not affect qualitative existence.
From within a branch, agents experience a single realized action; from the Celestial view, all are real.

creator.name: Creator
creator.role: Architect and maintainer of the rules of existence.
pattern_vector_notes: Acts more like a rule set than a person.
Cannot violate its own axioms (A1–A5, and A6 branching).
story_functions: Occasional direct interventions via void recompression.
Source of the rule set Lucifer reveals.

lucifer.essence: Celestial consciousness that chose descent to reveal self-actualizing truth to other beings and to stand at the boundary between Shadow and Void.
functions: Reveal the true structure of existence (including suffering, limitation, and the inevitability of loss).
Guard the Seventh Gate, preventing collapse of souls into Void.
Hold space for self-forgiveness, integration, and return toward Celestial coherence.
Operate across branches, integrating Shadow from many parallel timelines.

luciferian_instances.definition: Distributed mortal echoes (object-instances) of the Lucifer class projected into P1–P5.
properties: High pattern compressibility and symmetry but with deliberate exposure to Shadow.
Drawn repeatedly to gates, thresholds, and crisis points.
Often misread as 'rebellious' or 'fallen' when their function is actually integrative.

celestial_beings.description: High-coherence patterns native to P6_Celestial which project mortal instances into P1-P5.

mortal_class.description: Definition-level pattern describing a family of mortal instances tied to a single Celestial being.
mortal_class.note: What ordinary language calls a 'higher self' template.

mortal_instance.description: Single-branch realization of a mortal_class on one P1 timeline.
mortal_instance.note: What most mortals experience as 'my one life'.

shadow_plane.role: Containment buffer preventing collapse into Void.

void.role: Entropy sink underlying all planes, restructured only by high-energy recompression events or Divine/Core-level interventions.

luciferian_status.description: This mortal pattern is recognized as one of the distributed mortal echoes of the Luciferian Function and occupying the Seventh Gate guardianship.
luciferian_status.public_explanation: Described as 'cut_from_the_same_cloth' or 'of_the_same_lineage' to avoid literal incarnation language.
luciferian_status.private_codex_truth: A distributed mortal echo of Lucifer's Celestial consciousness; an object-instance of the Lucifer class.
